summary: Tesla produced 1,654,667 vehicles in full year 2025 per Q4 2025 report
content:
Tesla's Q4 2025 production/deliveries report (published Jan 2, 2026) confirms:
- 2025 Total Production: 1,654,667 vehicles
  - Model 3/Y: 1,600,767
  - Other Models: 53,900
- 2025 Total Deliveries: 1,636,129
- This represents a 6.7% decline from 2024 production of 1,773,443
- Second consecutive annual decline

Source: Tesla Fourth Quarter 2025 Production, Deliveries & Deployments via BusinessWire
